  private attr N : Int
  private attr P : Int64
  private attr tree : Array(Int64)
  private attr arr : Array(Int64)

  def initialize(arr : Array(Int64), N : Int, P : Int64)
    @N = N
    @P = P
    @tree = Array(4 * N + 1) { 0_i64 }

  private def build(node : Int, start : Int, end : Int)
    if start == end
      @tree[node] = @arr[start]
      return
    end
    
    mid = (start + end) / 2
    build(2 * node, start, mid)
    build(2 * node + 1, mid + 1, end)
